overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a character exploring a rainy nighttime courtyard in a historic stone village setting. The character navigates through narrow alleys and open courtyards with colonial architecture, ascending stone stairs while illuminated by warm lantern light against the dark wet environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow stone alley between high walls

events.description: passing through wooden gate from narrow alley into open courtyard

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through narrow passage toward wooden gate ahead

entered.detail: tall stone walls forming narrow passage on left side
wooden gate with diagonal cross bracing at end of alley
warm glowing lantern sitting on wooden table
vertical metal drain pipe attached to wall

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow stone alleyway flanked by high walls, approaching a wooden gate. Warm lantern light illuminates the passage from a table on the right as the character moves toward the transition point.

scene_state.functional_zone: open stone courtyard with colonial architecture

events.description: exiting sheltered alley into open courtyard exposed to rain

agents.ego_description: walking across wet courtyard and turning toward stone staircase

entered.detail: two-story stone building with wooden balconies and arched doorways
wooden balcony railing on upper floor of building
wet cobblestone pavement reflecting lantern light
wooden scaffolding structure with cross beams

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the alley into an open courtyard, the character walks across wet cobblestones toward a stone staircase. A colonial stone building with wooden balconies dominates the right side while rain falls steadily in the open air.

scene_state.functional_zone: exterior stone staircase and upper walkway

events.description: beginning to ascend stone stairs to upper level

agents.ego_description: climbing stone stairs while rain continues to fall

entered.detail: wide stone steps leading to upper courtyard level
wall-mounted lantern casting warm light on building facade
wooden table with lit lantern at top of stairs

segments.scene_description: The character ascends the stone staircase to an upper walkway, passing a wooden table with a lantern. Rain continues to fall as the character climbs, with the colonial building facade now closer on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper courtyard walkway with tropical vegetation

events.description: character stops walking and stands still near vegetation

agents.ego_description: walking along upper walkway and stopping near large potted plants

entered.detail: large tropical plants in stone planters

segments.scene_description: Walking along the upper courtyard walkway, the character passes large potted tropical plants and wooden barrels. The character continues along the building facade before stopping near the vegetation, with the colonial architecture now visible on the left side of the frame.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a confined stone alleyway into an expansive, rain-slicked colonial courtyard. It begins by following the character through a narrow passage flanked by high walls, guided by the warm glow of a lantern on a nearby table. As the character passes through a wooden gate, the scene opens into a wide courtyard of wet cobblestones where a colonial building with wooden balconies emerges under a steady rainfall. The camera then tracks the character as they ascend a stone staircase, passing another lantern-lit table while the building's facade looms closer. Finally, the movement shifts along an upper walkway, gliding past large potted tropical plants and wooden barrels before coming to a halt beside the lush vegetation.
